# versions-and-options

kustomize.enable, buildOptions, and per-version path/buildOptions

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/kustomize/versions-and-options` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  kustomize.enable: "true"
  kustomize.buildOptions: "--enable-helm"
  kustomize.path.v4.5.7: /usr/local/bin/kustomize-v4
  kustomize.buildOptions.v4.5.7: "--load-restrictor LoadRestrictionsNone"
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  repoServer:
    kustomize:
      buildOptions: --enable-helm
      enabled: true
      versions:
      - buildOptions: --load-restrictor LoadRestrictionsNone
        name: v4.5.7
        path: /usr/local/bin/kustomize-v4
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  kustomize.buildOptions: --enable-helm
  kustomize.buildOptions.v4.5.7: --load-restrictor LoadRestrictionsNone
  kustomize.enable: "true"
  kustomize.path.v4.5.7: /usr/local/bin/kustomize-v4
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

## Diagnostics

### `diagnostics.yaml`

```yaml
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-rbac-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
```
